recommendations.title: Jolly LLB 2
recommendations.overview: A blunt, abrasive and yet oddly compassionate Jagdishwar Mishra aka Jolly, a small-time struggling lawyer who moves from Kanpur to the city of Nawabs to pursue his dream of becoming a big-time lawyer.

recommendations.title: Pil's Adventures
recommendations.overview: Pil, a little vagabond girl, lives on the streets of the medieval city of Roc-en-Brume, along with her three tame weasels. She survives of food stolen from the castle of the sinister Regent Tristain. One day, to escape his guards, Pil disguises herse

recommendations.title: Force of Evil
recommendations.overview: Lawyer Joe Morse wants to consolidate all the small-time numbers racket operators into one big powerful operation. But his elder brother Leo is one of these small-time operators who wants to stay that way, preferring not to deal with the gangsters wh

recommendations.title: Fool's Paradise
recommendations.overview: A down-on-his-luck publicist discovers a recently released mental health patient who looks just like a misbehaving movie star. The publicist subs him into a film, creating a new star. But fame and fortune are not all they are cracked up to be.

recommendations.title: Amores Perros
recommendations.overview: A fatalistic car crash in Mexico city sets off a chain of events in the lives of three people: a supermodel, a young man wanting to run off with his sister-in-law, and a homeless man.

recommendations.title: Under the Same Roof
recommendations.overview: Nadia and Adrián starts their particular world war when she files to divorce him.

recommendations.title: All-Time High
recommendations.overview: A con artist in dire need of cash and a woman with a crypto fortune hit it off. Is she the target of his dreams, or is the scammer about to get scammed?

recommendations.title: Woody Woodpecker
recommendations.overview: Woody Woodpecker enters a turf war with a big city lawyer wanting to tear down his home in an effort to build a house to flip.

recommendations.title: Josie and the Pussycats
recommendations.overview: Josie, Melody and Val are three small-town girl musicians determined to take their rock band out of their garage and straight to the top, while remaining true to their look, style and sound. They get a record deal which brings fame and fortune but so

recommendations.title: Flashback
recommendations.overview: A female lawyer travels back in time and crosses paths with other women in history who fought for women's rights.
